(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 6): b4 on table, b5 on b4, b6 on b5, b7 on b6, b8 on b7, b9 on b8
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 8): b10 on table, b11 on b10, b12 on b11, b13 on b12, b14 on b13, b15 on b14, b16 on b15, b17 on b16
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (clear b17)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (already on table, so just clear)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top of b3
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)

      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)
    )

)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19 b20)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 5): b4 on table, b5 on b4, b6 on b5, b7 on b6, b8 on b7
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 5): b9 on table, b10 on b9, b11 on b10, b12 on b11, b13 on b12
    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (clear b13)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 7): b14 on table, b15 on b14, b16 on b15, b17 on b16, b18 on b17, b19 on b18, b20 on b19
    (on-table b14)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (on b20 b19)
    (clear b20)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (still on table, single block)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b3 on table, b2 on b3
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19 b20)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 5): b4 on table, b5 on b4, b6 on b5, b7 on b6, b8 on b7
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 5): b9 on table, b10 on b9, b11 on b10, b12 on b11, b13 on b12
    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (clear b13)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 7): b14 on table, b15 on b14, b16 on b15, b17 on b16, b18 on b17, b19 on b18, b20 on b19
    (on-table b14)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (on b20 b19)
    (clear b20)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (still on table, but clear condition met)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b3 on table, b2 on b3
      (on-table b3)

  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19 b20)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 3): b2, b3, b4 (b2 on table, b3 on b2, b4 on b3)
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (on b4 b3)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 4): b5, b6, b7, b8 (b5 on table, b6 on b5, b7 on b6, b8 on b7)
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 6): b9, b10, b11, b12, b13, b14 (b9 on table, b10 on b9, ..., b14 on b13)
    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
